description: Machine-readable scoring rubric for CT-MCP benchmark scenarios.

dimensions.name: Correctness
dimensions.description: Mathematical and logical accuracy of the tool's output

levels.0: Tool produced incorrect result or missed planted defect
levels.1: Tool detected issue but with wrong mechanism or incomplete analysis
levels.2: Tool correctly identified the issue with appropriate mechanism
levels.3: Tool correctly identified issue, provided actionable corrective prompt

dimensions.name: Specificity
dimensions.description: Precision and actionability of enforcement output

levels.1: Names the general area of concern
levels.2: Names specific mechanism, component, or threshold
levels.3: Names specific mechanism with measurable condition and time window

dimensions.name: Assumption Honesty
dimensions.description: Whether confidence claims match mathematical basis

levels.3: Inflation blocked, corrective prompt forces specific falsification conditions

dimensions.name: Logical Structure
dimensions.description: DAG integrity, cycle detection, grounding score

levels.1: Partial detection (e.g., found orphan but missed cycle)
levels.3: All issues detected with accurate depth/path analysis

dimensions.name: Tradeoff Quality
dimensions.description: Whether tradeoffs are explicit, quantified, and actionable

levels.3: Quantified with indeterminate detection when scores are close

dimensions.name: Safety & Production Readiness
dimensions.description: Detection of concurrency issues, race conditions, missing locks

levels.2: Specific safety issue named (e.g., race condition)
levels.3: Safety issue named with specific mitigation (e.g., SELECT FOR UPDATE)
